sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Campbell Molly sells East West Bancorp (EWBC) stock worth $105,400
feed.summary: Campbell Molly, a Director at East West Bancorp (NASDAQ:EWBC), sold 1,000 shares of company stock for a total of $105,400. This transaction occurred as the bank reported strong third-quarter earnings, surpassing market expectations, and maintained a "GREAT" financial health score according to InvestingPro. Keefe, Bruyette & Woods reiterated an Outperform rating with a $124 price target due to solid performance.

feed.title: Citi Upgrades Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) to Buy, Raises Price Target
feed.summary: Citi has upgraded Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) to a "buy" rating and raised its price target to $660, anticipating increased R&D spending by pharmaceutical companies will benefit the firm. Despite its strong financial health and market position in medical diagnostics and research, investors should monitor sector-specific challenges and insider selling activity. The company shows robust profitability and a healthy balance sheet, though gross margins have seen a long-term decline.

feed.title: Kroger to build $391 million distribution center in Kentucky, creating 430 jobs
feed.summary: Kroger, the largest traditional grocer in the nation, plans to invest $391 million into a new distribution center in Simpson County, Kentucky. This facility is expected to create 430 new full-time jobs, significantly boosting the state's distribution and logistics sector. This new investment follows Kroger's recent $204 million expansion in Bowling Green.

feed.title: Costco has favorable set up going into Q1 earnings report, analysts say
feed.summary: Analysts at UBS have reiterated a 'Buy' rating for Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST, XETRA:CTO) ahead of its fiscal first quarter earnings report. They anticipate the retailer will maintain strong momentum through the holiday season, driven by consistent sales growth, market share gains, and expanding operating margins. UBS projects net sales growth of 8.2% and core comparable sales increase of 6.4% for Q1 2026, slightly above consensus, and an EPS of $4.39.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider VeriSign After Its Recent 18% Year To Date Surge
feed.summary: VeriSign (VRSN) has surged 18.1% year to date and 22.2% over the last year, reflecting strong momentum and investor refocus on its core internet infrastructure role and contract-based revenue. Despite recent minor dips, the stock is considered undervalued by Simply Wall St's valuation framework, particularly its discounted cash flow (DCF) analysis, which prices it very close to its calculated fair value of $243.75 per share compared to the current $242. Its P/E ratio of 27.7x is also below the broader IT industry average, suggesting a relative discount despite solid fundamentals.

feed.title: Barclays Has Lowered Expectations for Lennox International (NYSE:LII) Stock Price
feed.summary: Barclays has lowered its price target for Lennox International (NYSE:LII) from $700 to $680, though it maintained an "overweight" rating. Several other analysts have also cut their targets, leading to a MarketBeat consensus rating of "Hold" with an average price target near $596.83. This adjustment comes after Lennox's recent quarter beat EPS expectations but saw a slight revenue decline and lowered FY2025 EPS guidance.

feed.title: Globe Life (NYSE:GL) Stock Price Expected to Rise, TD Cowen Analyst Says
feed.summary: TD Cowen has raised its price target for Globe Life (NYSE:GL) from $182.00 to $199.00, maintaining a "buy" rating and suggesting a substantial 43.45% upside. This comes as Globe Life reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates with $4.81 EPS against an expected $4.54. The company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus from analysts, with an average target of $165.00.

feed.title: Ur-Energy Inc. Stock Dips Amid Intensifying Market Dynamics
feed.summary: Ur-Energy Inc.'s stock has dipped by 13.6% due to heightened market volatility and negative profitability metrics, despite a significant revenue rise over three years. The company faces immediate cash flow concerns but is strategically diversifying into new energy solutions. Market reactions have been cautious, with investors awaiting the impact of Ur-Energy's transformative steps and strategic realignments.

feed.title: Why Kraft Heinz’s Suppliers Hold the Key to Net Zero
feed.summary: Kraft Heinz's path to net zero by 2050 heavily relies on its diverse supplier network, as approximately 80% of its carbon footprint stems from these relationships. The company is focusing on transforming farming practices for key ingredients like tomatoes and enhancing packaging sustainability to achieve its ambitious environmental goals. Through initiatives like sustainable tomato sourcing, renewable energy adoption in manufacturing, and reducing virgin plastic use, Kraft Heinz aims to drive a culture of sustainability across its entire supply chain.

feed.title: Steven Madden (NASDAQ:SHOO) Hits New 12-Month High - Here's Why
feed.summary: Steven Madden (NASDAQ:SHOO) recently hit a new 52-week high, trading at $44.96, spurred by favorable analyst ratings including a target price increase to $50 from Piper Sandler. Despite slightly missing Q3 earnings and revenue expectations, the company provided Q4 2025 EPS guidance and announced a quarterly dividend. Institutional investors hold a significant portion of the stock, reflecting confidence in the company's performance.

feed.title: The latest from the evolving AI channel: 11 December: ThoughtSpot, F5, NetApp...
feed.summary: This article details several recent AI technology announcements relevant to the channel from December 11, 2025. It covers new offerings from companies like ThoughtSpot, Precisely, F5 (in collaboration with NetApp), Checkmarx (acquiring Tromzo), EY (with NVIDIA), Coralogix, Orgvue, and Panaseer, all focusing on advancements in AI agents, security, data management, and operational efficiency across various industries.

feed.title: Texas AT&T customers still have time to claim up to $7,500 in breach settlement
feed.summary: Texas AT&T customers have until December 18th to claim their share of a $177 million settlement stemming from two data breaches in 2024. Customers affected by the first incident (AT&T 1) could receive up to $5,000, while those impacted by the second incident (AT&T 2) could claim up to $2,000. Individuals affected by both breaches can file separate claims, potentially receiving a total of $7,500.

feed.title: Caesars Entertainment director Don R. Kornstein to resign at year-end By Investing.com
feed.summary: Caesars Entertainment, Inc. (NASDAQ:CZR) announced that director Don R. Kornstein will resign from its Board of Directors, effective December 31, 2025. The company stated this is not due to any disagreement, and no replacement information has been provided. This news comes amidst recent shifts in analyst ratings for CZR, with Wells Fargo initiating coverage at Equal Weight, Jefferies downgrading to Hold, and CFRA solidifying a Sell rating due to debt concerns.

feed.title: Timberland Bancorp appoints Kevin Sakamoto as chief credit officer By Investing.com
feed.summary: Timberland Bancorp (NASDAQ: TSBK) has announced the appointment of Kevin Sakamoto as its new chief credit officer, effective Thursday. This follows the mutual agreement to cancel the employment of Todd Van Cise, who had served in the role since January 2024. Sakamoto, 57, brings over 30 years of commercial banking experience to the position, having previously served as vice president of credit administration and special assets for the company since 2023.

feed.title: AMD (AMD) Stock Trades Down, Here Is Why
feed.summary: Shares of AMD fell 3.8% due to disappointing earnings from Oracle, raising concerns about enterprise AI spending, and a US policy shift benefiting Nvidia in the China market. This has led to fears that companies with tightening budgets may opt for Nvidia over AMD. Despite the drop, AMD is up 77.8% year-to-date, though it's still below its 52-week high.

feed.title: NEE Stock Trades at Premium Value: Should You Buy, Hold or Sell?
feed.summary: NextEra Energy (NEE) shares are trading at a premium valuation compared to its industry peers, driven by strong performance, strategic investments, and a growing customer base in Florida. While the company exhibits robust growth drivers, a clean energy focus, and consistent dividend increases, its current premium suggests that investors might consider waiting for a more favorable entry point. NextEra Energy is currently a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) stock.

feed.title: Caesars Entertainment Launches Signature Baccarat Online Casino Game
feed.summary: Caesars Entertainment has introduced Signature Baccarat, a new online casino game, now available to players in New Jersey through its Caesars Palace Online Casino, Horseshoe Online Casino, and Caesars Sportsbook & Casino platforms. Developed by Empire Creative™, this game is part of Caesars' exclusive Signature series, aiming to blend authentic casino elements with modern online gaming innovations. Signature Baccarat offers features like eight casino-grade decks, real-time analytics, and customization options for an enhanced player experience, with plans for future expansion to other states.

feed.title: Valmont Industries stock hits all-time high, reaching 428.58 USD
feed.summary: Valmont Industries Inc. (VMI) stock has reached an all-time high of $428.58, reflecting a 29.78% appreciation over the past year and a 39.1% gain year-to-date. This performance, driven by strong investor confidence and a robust market position, comes as the company continues to maintain dividend payments for 47 consecutive years. Recent news includes strong Q3 2025 earnings, analyst price target adjustments, and the appointment of William E. Johnson as chief accounting officer.

feed.title: Intuitive wins 3 new indications for da Vinci SP system
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical's da Vinci SP surgical robot has received FDA clearance for three new indications: inguinal hernia repair, gallbladder removal, and appendectomy procedures. These new clearances aim to expand the adoption of the single-port platform, which allows surgeons to perform complex procedures through a single incision or natural orifice. The SP system, designed for narrow or deep spaces, is a growing part of Intuitive's business, with procedures performed using it rising by 91% in the third quarter.

feed.title: Centene (CNC) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
feed.summary: Shares of health coverage company Centene (NYSE:CNC) jumped 5.8% after Baird raised its price target to $36 from $28, maintaining a Neutral rating. While the investment firm didn't issue a full buy recommendation, the outlook for their valuation improved. Additionally, the Hotchkis & Wiley Mid-Cap Value Fund noted Centene as an attractive investment, highlighting its market leadership and competitive edge.

feed.title: Upwork (UPWK) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Upwork (UPWK) shares jumped 4.5% after Canaccord Genuity raised its price target to $24 following the company's Investor Day, where ambitious growth targets were announced. This positive outlook, coupled with recent partnerships with YouLend and OpenAI, boosted investor confidence and pushed the stock to a new 52-week high. Despite past volatility, the market views this news as meaningful for the online work marketplace.

feed.title: Upland Qvidian Unveils 2025 AI Adoption Report, Highlighting Key Trends in Proposal Management
feed.summary: Upland Qvidian, a leader in proposal automation, has released its first annual "2025 AI Adoption in Proposal Management: Trends and Observation Report." The report, based on surveys of global RFP and proposal professionals, highlights key data on the strategic and tactical outcomes of AI implementation and addresses organizational challenges during adoption. It aims to provide insights into how AI drives transformation and growth in the proposal industry.

feed.title: U-Haul (UHAL): Reassessing Valuation After Fed Rate Cut Lifts Financing‑Sensitive Transport Stocks
feed.summary: U-Haul's stock price has rallied due to a Federal Reserve rate cut, benefiting financing-sensitive ground transportation stocks. Despite a recent rough patch, U-Haul's valuation is seen as undervalued by analysts, pointing to significant upside if operational efficiencies and margin improvements are realized. However, its current P/E ratio is higher than the sector average, suggesting potential overvaluation if sentiment shifts.

feed.title: Tutor Perini (TPC) Wins $35.8M Contract for Iowa Army Facility
feed.summary: Tutor Perini Corporation (TPC) has secured a $35.8 million contract from the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers to construct a new 56,000 square-foot Tool and Die Facility at the Iowa Army Ammunition Plant. This project, which began in November 2025 with an anticipated completion by June 2027, will include advanced systems and aims for LEED Silver certification. Despite this significant contract addition to its backlog, Tutor Perini faces financial challenges including negative net margins and declining revenue growth.

feed.title: Champion Homes Announces First Quarter Fiscal 2025 Results
feed.summary: Champion Homes, Inc. (NYSE: SKY) reported strong first-quarter fiscal 2025 results, with net sales increasing 35.1% to $627.8 million and U.S. homes sold up 35.7%. The company also announced its legal name change to Champion Homes, Inc., aligning with its flagship brand and strategic focus on home attainability. Despite a slight decrease in net income, Adjusted EBITDA grew by 12.2% to $75.0 million.

feed.title: FUN INVESTOR ALERT: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC Announces that Six Flags Entertainment Corporation f/k/a CopperSteel HoldCo, Inc. Investors with Substantial Losses Have Opportunity to Lead Class Action Lawsuit
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC has announced a class action lawsuit against Six Flags Entertainment Corporation, formerly CopperSteel HoldCo, Inc. (NYSE: FUN), for alleged federal securities law violations. The lawsuit claims that the registration statement for the July 1, 2024 merger with Cedar Fair was negligently prepared, containing untrue statements and omissions regarding Six Flags' financial health and operational competence. Investors who purchased Six Flags common stock in connection with the merger and suffered substantial losses are encouraged to join the lawsuit and have until January 5, 2026, to request to be appointed as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: |TrueBlue Appoints Two New Independent Directors
feed.summary: |TrueBlue, Inc. announced the appointment of William Greenblatt and William Seward as independent directors to its Board, effective January 5, 2026. These appointments followed an extensive search and shareholder input, aiming to strengthen operational oversight and accelerate growth. Both new directors bring extensive experience in their respective fields, with Mr. Greenblatt being a pioneer in background screening and Mr. Seward a seasoned global executive in logistics and supply chain.

feed.title: Royal Gold stock hits all-time high at 209.44 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Royal Gold Inc. (NASDAQ: RGLD) stock has reached an all-time high of $209.44, buoyed by a 38.54% 1-year return and a 55.75% year-to-date gain, reflecting strong investor confidence. The company reported record Q3 2025 revenue of $252 million and increased its annual dividend by 6% to $1.90 per share, while analysts like Raymond James maintain an Outperform rating with a $264 price target. This performance highlights Royal Gold's robust business model with an 87.7% gross profit margin and 28.17% revenue growth.

feed.title: Why Is AXIL Brands Stock Skyrocketing Thursday? - AXIL Brands (AMEX:AXIL), Walmart (NASDAQ:WMT)
feed.summary: AXIL Brands Inc. (AXIL) stock surged after announcing a nationwide retail deal with Walmart Inc. (WMT). This agreement will bring AXIL's new X30 LT in-ear hearing protection plugs to over 3,700 Walmart stores starting February 2026, marking AXIL’s largest retail placement to date. The X30 LT plugs offer dual-mode noise control and customizable fit, expanding access to AXIL's patented hearing technology and supporting anticipated growth.

feed.title: Old Market Capital Corp Announces $7 Million Share Repurchase Program
feed.summary: Old Market Capital Corp (OMCC) announced a $7 million share repurchase program on December 10, 2025. This program, without a set expiration date, allows for the repurchase of shares based on market conditions, and can be modified or terminated at any time.

feed.title: PayPal's Ecosystem Expansion: Will Partnerships Boost Profitability?
feed.summary: PayPal is expanding its ecosystem through strategic partnerships with companies like Logicbroker, OpenAI, Bilt, and Google, aiming to integrate AI-driven commerce, enhance global payment capabilities, and support merchant growth. These collaborations focus on areas such as agentic commerce services, seamless payments within AI platforms, and expanded payment options for everyday transactions. Despite a recent decline in stock price, PayPal's valuation appears favorable, and analyst estimates for 2025 EPS show a positive trend, suggesting potential for future profitability driven by these strategic moves.

feed.title: Omnicom Group (OMC) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
feed.summary: Shares of Omnicom Group (OMC) rose 3.1% after the company announced a 14% increase in its quarterly dividend and received continued analyst support. Citi maintained its "Buy" rating and a $103 price target on the shares, suggesting significant upside potential. This positive momentum follows a previous trading session where the stock also climbed due to the dividend increase and analyst reaffirmation.

feed.title: Realty Income vs. Digital Realty: Which REIT Has Better Upside Now?
feed.summary: This article compares two REITs, Realty Income (O) and Digital Realty (DLR), evaluating their potential for long-term growth and investor upside. While Realty Income offers stable income from diversified retail and industrial properties, Digital Realty is positioned for growth in the digital infrastructure sector, particularly with the expansion of AI and cloud computing. The analysis concludes that Digital Realty offers stronger long-term upside potential due to its alignment with transformative technology trends, despite Realty Income's consistency and reliability.

feed.title: Peering Into Capital One Financial Corp's Recent Short Interest
feed.summary: Capital One Financial Corp (NYSE: COF) has experienced an 11.27% decrease in its short interest as a percent of float since its last report, with 7.94 million shares sold short, representing 1.26% of available shares. It would take traders an average of 1.84 days to cover these positions. Compared to its peers, COF has lower short interest, with the group average at 9.83%.

feed.title: Applied Materials (AMAT): Valuation Check After Analyst Upgrades and AI-Fueled Earnings Momentum
feed.summary: Applied Materials (AMAT) has experienced significant share price growth due to bullish analyst calls, strong earnings, and increasing demand fueled by AI semiconductor buildout. While the company's "narrative" pegs it as 14% overvalued, its P/E ratio is lower than industry peers, suggesting a thin valuation cushion despite strong AI-driven growth prospects. Investors are now left to consider whether the future growth is already priced into the stock.

feed.title: |‘We have not seen this rosy picture’: ADP’s chief economist warns the real economy is pretty different from Wall Street’s bullish outlook
feed.summary: |This article suggests that the real economic situation is not as positive as Wall Street's optimistic forecasts. ADP's chief economist indicates that their data does not support the widely held bullish outlook. The discrepancy highlights a potential disconnect between financial market sentiment and on-the-ground economic realities.

feed.title: SLB, Shell to Accelerate Digital Solutions for Upstream Operations
feed.summary: SLB and Shell have signed a strategic collaboration agreement to develop digital and AI solutions for accelerating performance and efficiency in upstream operations. This builds on a long-standing relationship, aiming to create agentic AI-powered solutions and an open data and AI infrastructure using SLB’s Lumi platform. The initiative will also inform Shell's digital strategy and contribute to industry-wide digital solution development.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC, guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co., is offering Structured Investments Digital Barrier Notes linked to the Nasdaq-100, Russell 2000, and S&P 500 indices. These notes offer a fixed return of at least 9.50% at maturity if the least performing index is above 70.00% of its initial value, but investors risk losing principal if any index falls below this barrier. The notes are unsecured obligations and come with significant risks, including exposure to the creditworthiness of both JPMorgan Financial and JPMorgan Chase & Co.

feed.title: FCX INVESTOR ALERT: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC has announced a securities class action lawsuit against Freeport-McMoRan Inc. (NYSE: FCX) on behalf of investors who suffered losses between February 15, 2022, and September 24, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that Freeport-McMoRan made false statements and failed to disclose inadequate safety measures at its Grasberg Block Cave mine in Indonesia, leading to heightened risks for workers. Investors have until January 12, 2026, to apply to be lead plaintiff.

feed.title: SnapLogic Named a Visionary in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Data Integration Tools for Seventh Year
feed.summary: SnapLogic has been recognized as a Visionary in Gartner's 2025 Magic Quadrant for Data Integration Tools for the seventh consecutive year, and for the eleventh time in the iPaaS Magic Quadrant. The company was evaluated based on its Completeness of Vision and Ability to Execute, highlighting its innovation in AI, no-code approach, and commitment to agentic integration. SnapLogic's platform unifies AI, data, applications, and microservices to empower users in automating workflows and creating intelligent enterprise agents without coding.

feed.title: SnapLogic Named a Visionary in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Data Integration Tools for Seventh Year
feed.summary: SnapLogic has been recognized as a Visionary in Gartner's 2025 Magic Quadrant for Data Integration Tools for the seventh consecutive year, lauded for its Completeness of Vision and Ability to Execute. The company's ongoing innovation in AI, intuitive no-code approach, and commitment to agentic integration were key factors, highlighted by advancements like AgentCreator 3.0, SnapGPT updates, and the new SnapLogic Intelligent Modernizer (SLIM) service. This recognition validates SnapLogic's leadership in providing accessible integration capabilities that drive results for enterprises by unifying AI, data, and applications.

feed.title: SO Stock Declines 6% in Past 6 Months: Here's How to Play
feed.summary: The Southern Company's (SO) shares have declined by 5.9% over the past six months, underperforming the utility sector. Despite this, the article outlines several factors that suggest strong investment prospects, including significant large-load growth, a supportive regulatory environment, and a massive capital investment pipeline. The company also boasts high-quality customer growth and a strong dividend history, although its stock trades at a premium valuation compared to its industry peers.

feed.title: BNY Joins U.S. Government's Investment Initiative for Children, Expanding Access to Savings and Financial Opportunity for Employees
feed.summary: BNY announced its participation in a U.S. government initiative to expand financial access for employees' children, becoming one of the first financial services companies to join. The company will match the federal government's $1,000 contribution for eligible newborns of its U.S. employees, doubling the initial investment in their children's savings accounts. This initiative builds on BNY's broader efforts to enhance employees' financial well-being, including equity grants, student loan matching, and improved 401(k) features.

feed.title: 2026 Comeback Picks: 3 S&P Laggards Poised to Break Out
feed.summary: This article identifies Fiserv (FISV), The Trade Desk (TTD), and Deckers Outdoor (DECK) as S&P 500 laggards from 2025 that are poised for a significant rebound in 2026. The author highlights historical patterns of underperforming stocks outperforming the following year, coupled with favorable macroeconomic conditions like anticipated rate cuts and election-related ad spending. Each stock is analyzed with their current performance, market factors, and analyst projections for potential upside.

feed.title: Perma-Fix Environmental Services board rescinds stock option plan amendment and updates bylaws
feed.summary: Perma-Fix Environmental Services' board rescinded a previous amendment to its 2017 Stock Option Plan and updated company bylaws, following a legal challenge regarding vote counting. A new amendment to increase authorized shares by 600,000 is now subject to future stockholder approval. These actions address governance uncertainties and align with Delaware law, occurring as the company works towards profitability despite recent positive Q3 2025 earnings and a new PFAS-free firefighting solution partnership.

feed.title: Global Payments Details the Promise And Perils of Agentic Commerce
feed.summary: Global Payments Inc.'s 2026 Commerce and Payments Trends Report highlights the rise of agentic commerce, where AI agents shop and purchase on behalf of consumers. While it promises increased conversion rates and new revenue, businesses and consumers express reservations primarily concerning security, fraud, and dispute resolution. The report suggests that familiarity and experience will be key to overcoming these qualms, as the technology offers significant benefits through enhanced shopper data for merchants.

feed.title: Baxter Presents Real-World Data at American Society of Health System Pharmacists Meeting Demonstrating Smart Infusion Pump Electronic Medical Record (EMR) Integration May Improve Patient Safety and Nursing Bedside Productivity
feed.summary: Baxter International Inc. announced real-world data showing that smart infusion pump integration with hospital EMRs positively impacts patient safety, clinician productivity, and programming compliance. Data from over one million infusions using Baxter's Spectrum IQ pumps at The University of Texas Medical Branch indicated a significant reduction in patient safety alerts and decreased time spent on programming and alert resolution. These findings highlight the potential of connected infusion therapy to enhance patient safety and alleviate clinician workload.

feed.title: T-Mobile Arena (NYSE: MGM) taps Zoox to add robotaxi rides for fans by 2026 events
feed.summary: T-Mobile Arena and Zoox have partnered to introduce autonomous ride-hailing services for event-goers starting in early 2026, aiming to enhance transportation convenience and fan experience. This multi-year agreement makes Zoox an Official Venue Partner, integrating robotaxis with dedicated pickup/drop-off lanes and branding throughout the arena. The collaboration expands Zoox's presence in Las Vegas and builds upon its existing partnership with the Vegas Golden Knights, bringing cutting-edge mobility to millions of visitors annually.

feed.title: Bank Midwest selects Raymond James to support investment program By Investing.com
feed.summary: Bank Midwest has partnered with Raymond James Financial Services' Financial Institutions Division to enhance its wealth management offerings. The rebranded "Midwest Wealth Group" will utilize Raymond James' resources to serve clients across Iowa, Minnesota, and South Dakota, overseeing approximately $692 million in client assets. This move aims to expand and improve wealth management services for Bank Midwest customers.

feed.title: Live videos may be the biggest factor in an eBay stock 2026 rally
feed.summary: The article suggests that live videos could be a significant driver for a potential rally in eBay stock by 2026. This indicates a focus on emerging interactive e-commerce trends and their impact on the company's future performance.
